lines.english: Within it, the great merchant is said to dwell.
The infinite substance is within it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਵਨੁ ਬਾਪਾਰੀ ਜਾ ਕਾ ਊਹਾ ਵਿਸਾਹੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: kavan baapaaree jaa kaa aoohaa visaahu |1|
lines.english: Who is the trader who deals there? ||1||
He dedicates his mind and body to serving the Lord.
How rare is that trader who deals in the jewel of the Naam, the Name of the Lord.
He takes the Ambrosial Nectar as his food. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਵਨੁ ਸੁ ਜਨੁ ਜੋ ਸਉਦਾ ਜੋਰੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kavan su jan jo saudaa jorai |2|
lines.english: Who can settle this bargain? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਵਨ ਸੁ ਜੁਗਤਿ ਜਿਤੁ ਕਰਿ ਭੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: kavan su jugat jit kar bheejai |
lines.english: How can we please the Lord?
I fall at His Feet, and I renounce all sense of 'mine and yours'.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਵਡ ਸਾਹੁ ਜਾ ਕੇ ਕੋਟਿ ਵਣਜਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: toon vadd saahu jaa ke kott vanajaare |
lines.english: You are the Great Merchant; You have millions of traders.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲੁ ਸਾਹ ਕਾ ਕਿਨ ਬਿਧਿ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: mehal saah kaa kin bidh paavai |
lines.english: How can I attain the Mansion of the Lord's Presence?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਵਨ ਸੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਜਿਤੁ ਭੀਤਰਿ ਬੁਲਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: kavan su bidh jit bheetar bulaavai |
lines.english: How can I get Him to call me inside?
Seeking and searching, I have found my own home, deep within my own being.
Who is the benefactor? Who can take me to Him? ||3||
The True Lord has shown me the priceless jewel.
Says Nanak, place your faith in the Guru. ||4||16||85||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl, Gwaarayree:
When the Great Merchant shows His Mercy, He blends us into Himself.
Night and day, they remain in the Love of the One.
They make the Name of their Lord and Master their way of life;

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਉ ਜਾਣੈ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਸੰਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: prabh kau jaanai sad hee sangaa |
lines.english: They know that God is always with them.
they are satisfied and fulfilled with the Blessed Vision of the Lord's Darshan. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪੂਰੇ ਕੀ ਸਰਨੀ ਪਰੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur poore kee saranee pare |1| rahaau |
lines.english: entering the Sanctuary of the Perfect Guru. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਮਨ ਤਨ ਹਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: har sang raate man tan hare |
lines.english: Imbued with the Love of the Lord, their minds and bodies are rejuvenated,
There is only one trade, and one occupation.
The Lord's Lotus Feet are the Support of the soul.
They see only the One, and obey His Order.
They know no other than the Formless Lord. ||2||
They remain unattached, joined to the Lord's Way.
They are free of both pleasure and pain.
How can I describe the Glories of the Saints?
They focus their meditation on the Supreme Lord God. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੀਸਹਿ ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਸਭ ਤੇ ਰਹਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: deeseh sabh meh sabh te rahate |
lines.english: They are seen among all, and yet they are distinct from all.
Bless Nanak with the dust of the feet of the Saints. ||4||17||86||
O Supreme Lord God, please shower Your Mercy upon me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗਾਧਿ ਬੋਧਿ ਕਿਛੁ ਮਿਤਿ ਨਹੀ ਜਾਨਉ ॥
lines.translit: agaadh bodh kichh mit nahee jaanau |
lines.english: Their knowledge is unfathomable; their limits cannot be known.
Gauree Gwaarayree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਮੇਰਾ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮੁ ਤੁਮ ਸੰਗਿ ਹੀਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: toon meraa preetam tum sang heet |
lines.english: You are my Beloved; I am in love with You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਮੇਰਾ ਸਖਾ ਤੂੰਹੀ ਮੇਰਾ ਮੀਤੁ ॥
lines.translit: toon meraa sakhaa toonhee meraa meet |
lines.english: You are my Companion; You are my Best Friend.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਮੇਰੇ ਲਾਲਨ ਤੂੰ ਮੇਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: toon mere laalan toon mere praan |
lines.english: You are my Intimate Beloved, You are my breath of life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਮੇਰੀ ਪਤਿ ਤੂਹੈ ਮੇਰਾ ਗਹਣਾ ॥
lines.translit: toon meree pat toohai meraa gahanaa |
lines.english: You are my honor; You are my decoration.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਝ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਿਮਖੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ਰਹਣਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tujh bin nimakh na jaaee rahanaa |1|
lines.english: Without You, I cannot survive, even for an instant. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਤੁਮ ਰਾਖਹੁ ਤਿਵ ਹੀ ਰਹਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: jiau tum raakhahu tiv hee rahanaa |
lines.english: As You keep me, so do I survive.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਮੇਰੇ ਸਾਹਿਬ ਤੂੰ ਮੇਰੇ ਖਾਨ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: toon mere saahib toon mere khaan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: You are my Lord and Master; You are my Leader. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਮੇਰੀ ਨਵ ਨਿਧਿ ਤੂੰ ਭੰਡਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: toon meree nav nidh toon bhanddaar |
lines.english: You are my nine treasures, You are my storehouse.
Wherever I look, there I see You dwelling.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤੁਮ ਕਹਹੁ ਸੋਈ ਮੋਹਿ ਕਰਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: jo tum kahahu soee mohi karanaa |
lines.english: Whatever You say, that is what I do.
O my Fearless Lord, with my tongue, I chant Your Name. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਮੇਰੀ ਓਟ ਤੂੰ ਹੈ ਮੇਰਾ ਤਕੀਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: toon meree ott toon hai meraa takeea |3|
lines.english: You are my Shelter; You are my Anchoring Support. ||3||
I am imbued with Your Love; You are the Support of my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਮੇਰੀ ਸੋਭਾ ਤੁਮ ਸੰਗਿ ਰਚੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: toon meree sobhaa tum sang racheea |
lines.english: You are my Glory; I am blended with You.
I have obtained Your secret from the Guru.
Deep within my mind and body, I meditate on You.
Through the True Guru, the One and only Lord was implanted within me;
Gauree Gwaarayree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਟੇਕੈ ॥੪॥੧੮॥੮੭॥
lines.translit: naanak daas har har har ttekai |4|18|87|
lines.english: servant Nanak has taken to the Support of the Lord, Har, Har, Har. ||4||18||87||
